subcodes.first_line: O Isma'il! Thou hast attained unto the most great joy and been adorned with supreme gladness, for the Truth, exalted be His glory, from the Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمعیل بفرح اکبر فائز شدی و بسرور اعظم مزین چه که حق جل جلاله از شطر سجن
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @principle of balance; moderation; equilibrium
